title: spicy aerated vietnamese foie-gras toast
description: a refreshing and spicy brunch dish with the richness of foie-gras, featuring a light and airy texture from the meringue topping
instructions: toasted the baguette slices in a toaster or under the broiler for 2-3 minutes.
spooned 1-2 ounces of the toasted foie-gras onto each toasted baguette slice.
drizzled 1 tablespoon of sriracha chili sauce over the foie-gras, followed by 1 tablespoon of sugar (if using).
topped each slice with 1/4 cup of pickled carrots and daikon and 1/4 cup of pickled mint leaves.
whipped the egg whites with a pinch of salt and 1 teaspoon of cream of tartar until stiff peaks formed.
folded 1/2 cup of granulated sugar into the egg whites to create a light and airy meringue.
spooned the meringue topping over the pickled vegetables.
sprinkled chopped peanuts or chopped cilantro over the meringue topping (if using).
garnished with fresh cilantro leaves and served immediately.
